title: Cryptosporidium spp
author: Li, Na
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-zero

steps.instruction: 3.1. Occurrence of Cryptosporidium spp., G. duodenalis and E. bieneusi      Among the 109 specimens analyzed, 6 (5.5%) were positive for  Cryptosporidium  spp. by PCR analysis of the  SSU rRNA  gene and 16 (14.7%) were positive for  E. bieneusi  by PCR analysis of the  ITS  (Table 1). In contrast, none of them were positive for  G. duodenalis  by  tpi  -based PCR.
